title.en: On the way to Panyun Star.

content.en:
The Sword Feather God Lord ended his conversation with Allah of the Yan Dao, and immediately sealed the Origin Sword Weapon and 50 Jin Chaos Rare Earth into a box, and immediately secretly sent an ordinary galaxy-level deacon to Panyun Star.

......

On the way to Panyun Star.

Tie Feng Zhenjun looked at the box in his hand, and seemed curious: "The sect master asked me to send this box to Panyun Xing, and it will be given to the disciples who guard Panyun Xing, what is the use of this box? And isn't Panyun Star sealed, with the strength of the sect master, unless it is the cosmic god, it can't break the seal, why do you have to send someone to guard it?"

Although he was very puzzled, he naturally couldn't help but do what the Sword Feather God Lord ordered.

And.

To be able to be favored by the sect master, personally order things, and carry out secretly, he must be valued.

"Maybe I can be reused by the sect master in the future, even if I don't have a chance to become a galaxy-level in the future, I can still revitalize the family!" Tie Feng Zhenjun thought.

However, what Tie Feng True Monarch didn't notice was that a pair of eyes were staring at him in the dark.

Undead Legion Headquarters.

Ye Tian's eyes were staring at Tiefeng Zhenjun, but he didn't care too much.

Because there are many people who pay attention to him at the same time, Tie Feng Zhenjun is just one of them.

However, when Tie Feng Zhenjun entered the area where Panyun Star was located, his attention was greatly focused on Tie Feng Zhenjun.

"A galaxy-level powerhouse goes to Panyun Star!"

Ye Tian continued to star.

Soon, Tie Feng Zhenjun came to Panyun Star.

......

Panyun Star.

After Tie Feng Zhenjun came here, he shouted: "I am Tie Feng Zhenjun, the deacon of the Sword Emperor Sect, on the order of the sect master, I will send something here, please come out and pick up the disciples of the Sword Emperor Sect stationed in Panyun Xing!"

Suddenly.

A figure walked out of the sealed Panyun Star.

The man was covered in black robes, wearing a mask, and his aura was close to nothing.

When Tie Feng Zhenjun saw this scene, he suddenly sensed that something was wrong in his heart.

How could a normal disciple of the Sword Emperor Sect be dressed like this, and this person's aura couldn't even peep into him, and there was even a faint oppression.

"This man is strong!"

Tie Feng Zhenjun said.

However, he believed that the sect master would not harm him, so he was not afraid.

But at this moment, the black-robed man spoke: "Leave things behind, people...... Gotta stay!"

Burst!

The black-robed man slashed it away.

In an instant, Tie Feng Zhenjun was killed, his body turned to ashes, and the box also fell into the hands of the black-robed man.

The next moment.

The black-robed man entered the clouds and disappeared.

--------

Undead Legion Headquarters.

Ye Tian also noticed the scene that happened in Pan Yunxing, and did not attract the attention of the black-robed man.

The town envoy order is created by the supremes, even the top cosmic god can't sense the prying eyes of the town envoy token, only the strong people who dominate the realm can sense the prying eyes of the town envoy order.

Therefore, the black-robed man couldn't sense it at all.

"Killing the galaxy level in one sword, although it is only through the snooping of the picture through the envoy order of the town domain, it is impossible to perceive the other party's cultivation, but it is definitely not a galaxy level, but a strong person above the galaxy level, and the other party took a box from the sword emperor sect, which is a galaxy level, and the inside of this box must be an important thing. Panyun Star was sealed by the Sword Feather Divine Lord, and without the permission of the Sword Feather Divine Lord, the galaxy level could not enter Panyun Star, but this person could enter and exit Panyun Star freely. "

Ye Tian smiled, he had roughly judged the location of Allah of the Yan Dao, and it was in Panyun Xing.

"Panyunxing, a place that has been almost forgotten, and there is a seal of the Sword Feather Divine Lord, so no one else can enter it at all. And a sealed place, and a place sealed by the Sword Feather God Lord, it is also very reasonable for the Sword Feather God Lord to send people to Panyun Star, if Allah Yan Dao is hiding in Pan Yun Star, it is very easy to contact Allah Yan Dao, and send things in, it is a very good place. Ye Tian muttered.

Immediately, Ye Tian ended his control of the town envoy order.

It's back to business as usual!

Wow!

The undead army lord appeared beside Ye Tian and asked, "The Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch stopped controlling the town envoy order so quickly, could it be that he has already confirmed the location of Allah of the Yan Dao?"

"Not bad!"

Ye Tian nodded: "If I guessed correctly, Allah of Yandao should be in Panyun Star!"

"Pan Yunxing, is this the place where the Yun family that was sealed by the Sword Feather Divine Lord himself is located?"

The undead are the main way.

"Yes, there it is!"

Ye Tian nodded.

"Then the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch wants to report to the Divine Blade Alliance?" said the undead army master.

"No hurry!" Ye Tian smiled: "It's just speculation now, it's not for sure, besides, if you personally capture Allah of the Yan Dao, wouldn't you be able to get more rewards from the Divine Blade Alliance?"

The undead army lord frowned and said: "Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, the Yan Dao Allah is very likely to break through to the realm of the Universe God, even if the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch can fight beyond the level, but if it is against the Universe God, ......"

Obviously, he didn't know much about Ye Tian's strength, otherwise he would never have said this.

"Undead military lord, don't worry, I have a sense of proportion!" In addition, I also know your difficulties, after all, Allah of the Yan Dao is the younger brother of the Sword Feather God Lord, if you make a move, you will definitely offend the Sword Emperor Sect, even if the Sword Emperor Sect has the crime of cover-up, but this is a matter of the Divine Blade Alliance, and it has nothing to do with you. So, it's not good for you to get involved. I'll handle this matter myself, and the immortal army master doesn't need to worry about it!"

Ye Tian hurriedly said.

"Wanfa Zhenjun, you better think about it, it's just a task, there's no need to put yourself in danger!"

The undead army master tried to persuade, but Ye Tian still insisted on going to Panyunxing.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left.

Looking at Ye Tian's departing back, the Immortal Army Lord muttered: "I still have to take a look, if something really happens to the Ten Thousand Laws True Monarch, if I save him, it will be equivalent to saving his life, and it is just an opportunity for him to owe me a favor! In the future, if he becomes a high-level of the human race, wouldn't I have the possibility of going further?"

Swish!

The undead lord followed, but from a distance.

......

Ye Tian's spaceship was very fast, and it shuttled to the area near Panyun Star in an instant.

Subsequently, Ye Tian flew to Panyunxing.

Outside the clouds.

Ye Tian looked at this sealed star, which had the sealing power of the Sword Feather Divine Lord, almost wrapping the entire Panyun Star into a cluster of light, like a small sun.

With the blessing of this sealing power, powerhouses below the galaxy level could not get close to Panyun Star at all.

But for Ye Tian, the power of this seal was too weak!

But no matter how weak the seal was, Ye Tian couldn't pass through the seal silently.

At the moment, he has only two options.

The first way is to find out the loophole of the seal or the method of sealing, so that you can manipulate the seal to enter the Panyun Star.

The second way is to break the seal directly, so there is no need to enter Panyun Star.

"The first method can't be done, unless you spend a lot of time analyzing the seal, or ask the Sword Feather God Lord for the sealing method, it's not realistic. Then use the second method, violent but direct!"

Ye Tiandao.
